<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band08_chunk002.pdf#page=18 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band08 p84 -->

<!-- header: FRAHAI -->

<!-- header: FRAHAM -->


[[File:Band08_chunk002_p018_img001.jpg|thumb|C Dreifaltigkeit, a-d Evangelister]]



[[File:Band08_chunk002_p018_img002.jpg|thumb]]



== Kapelle ==



[[File:Band08_chunk002_p018_img003.jpg|thumb|Ioachim und Ann]]



----
- 8
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band08 p85 -->
